title: pollinator sniffer
description: makes some kinds of vegetation renewable, like the spore blossom and lilypads
body:
**Makes Sniffer Usefull Giving Renewable Sources of Flowers and Plants**

## _List of the Loot Table:_

- Pitcher pod
